ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the tenant */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the tenant */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the tenant company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tenant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tenant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_systems" (
  "source_system_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each source system */,
  "source_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the source system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source system */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the source system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the source system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the source system was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the source system was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "management_groups" (
  "management_group_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each management group */,
  "management_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the management group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the management group */,
  "parent_group_id" TEXT /* Parent group ID for nested management groups */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the management group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the management group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_rules" (
  "rule_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each compliance rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance rule */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Security standard or benchmark to which the rule belongs */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the rule */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the rule */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the rule (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "endpoints" (
  "endpoint_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each endpoint */,
  "computer_name" TEXT /* Name of the computer */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the computer */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the computer */,
  "operating_system_generation" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "profile" TEXT /* Profile of the computer (e.g., corporate environment) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or geographical location of the endpoint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the endpoint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the endpoint was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* ID of the tenant performing the check */,
  "source_system_id" TEXT /* ID of the source system from which the data was collected */,
  "management_group_id" TEXT /* ID of the management group responsible for the check */,
  "endpoint_id" TEXT /* ID of the endpoint being checked */,
  "rule_id" TEXT /* ID of the compliance rule being checked */,
  "time_generated" TEXT /* Date and time the check was generated */,
  "status_category" TEXT /* Status category of the check (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the compliance rule */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the compliance check */,
  "raw_data" TEXT /* Raw data from the compliance check */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* Resource ID associated with the compliance check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the check was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the check was last updated */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the compliance check (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES endpoints ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_management_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("management_group_id") REFERENCES management_groups ("management_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES compliance_rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_source_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_system_id") REFERENCES source_systems ("source_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, auditor, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "check_id" TEXT /* ID of the compliance check being accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time the data was accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event was last updated */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_check_id FOREIGN KEY ("check_id") REFERENCES compliance_checks ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* ID of the tenant for which the report was generated */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* ID of the tenant for which the alert was generated */,
  "check_id" TEXT /* ID of the compliance check that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was generated */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last updated */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_check_id FOREIGN KEY ("check_id") REFERENCES compliance_checks ("check_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "check_id" TEXT /* ID of the compliance check associated with the audit event */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the audit event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the audit event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_check_id FOREIGN KEY ("check_id") REFERENCES compliance_checks ("check_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remediations" (
  "remediation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each remediation event */,
  "alert_id" TEXT /* ID of the alert associated with the remediation event */,
  "remediation_type" TEXT /* Type of remediation action performed (e.g., patch, update, configuration change) */,
  "remediation_time" TEXT /* Date and time the remediation action was performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who performed the remediation action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the remediation event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the remediation event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remediation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remediations_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remediations_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mitigations" (
  "mitigation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each mitigation event */,
  "alert_id" TEXT /* ID of the alert associated with the mitigation event */,
  "mitigation_type" TEXT /* Type of mitigation action performed (e.g., network isolation, system shutdown) */,
  "mitigation_time" TEXT /* Date and time the mitigation action was performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who performed the mitigation action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mitigation event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mitigation event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mitigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mitigations_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mitigations_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
